---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Get in Touch & Professional References"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Sections"
---

## Let's Connect

I am open to opportunities, collaborations, and professional networking. Whether you are a recruiter, a fellow analyst, or an organisation looking for data-driven insights — I'd love to hear from you.

---

## Contact Details

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Direct Contact

{{< fa envelope >}} **Email**
[shiva.sagar7130@gmail.com](mailto:shiva.sagar7130@gmail.com)

{{< fa phone >}} **Phone**
[+353 089 463 1708](tel:+353894631708)

{{< fa brands linkedin >}} **LinkedIn**
[linkedin.com/in/shiva-sagar-](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shiva-sagar-){target="_blank"}

{{< fa brands github >}} **GitHub**
[github.com/shivasagarsulige2-rgb](https://github.com/shivasagarsulige2-rgb){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Location & Availability

{{< fa location-dot >}} **Based in:** Dublin, Ireland
{{< fa clock >}} **Time Zone:** IST / GMT (flexible)
{{< fa calendar-check >}} **Full-time availability:** October 2026
{{< fa id-card >}} **Visa:** Stamp 2 · Eligible for Stamp 1G from Sept 2026

:::

:::

---

## Professional References

::: {.callout-note title="Reference Availability"}
Full references — including institutional emails and phone numbers — are available upon request. Please reach out via email to request a complete reference sheet.
:::

### Reference 1 — Academic Supervisor

**[Programme Director / Supervisor Name]**
*MSc Business Analytics Programme*
Dublin City University, Dublin, Ireland

- {{< fa envelope >}} Available upon request
- *Relationship: Academic supervisor for MSc Business Analytics coursework and capstone project*

---

### Reference 2 — Professional Reference

**[Senior Manager Name]**
*Management Team*
Samisthi PVT LTD

- {{< fa envelope >}} Available upon request
- *Relationship: Direct supervisor during Assistant Accounts Internship (Jun–Aug 2023)*

---

## Response Time

I aim to respond within **1–2 business days**.

::: {.callout-tip title="Best Way to Reach Me"}
Email is the fastest and most reliable channel. For professional enquiries please include a brief subject line — e.g., *"Graduate Analyst Role — 2026"* or *"Analytics Collaboration"*.
:::

---

## Open to Opportunities

I am currently open to:

- [x] Graduate programme applications (2026 intake)
- [x] Part-time analytics or data roles during studies
- [x] Collaborative analytics projects and case competitions
- [ ] Full-time analyst / data roles from October 2026
- [ ] Speaking or networking opportunities in the Dublin analytics community

---

*Thank you for visiting my portfolio. I look forward to connecting with you!*
